displayName: [Baseline] Require compliant device for management portals

_metadata.purpose: Restrict access to Azure management portals, Entra admin center, and Defender admin to compliant (Intune-managed) devices only. Prevents admins from logging into management surfaces from personal or untrusted devices.
deployment_notes: Requires Intune licensing AND admin devices enrolled in Intune compliance policies.
includeRoles: Global Admin, App Admin, Exchange Admin, Cloud App Admin. Add others as needed.
includeApplications: Microsoft Azure Management (797f4846), Microsoft Graph (c44b4083), Microsoft Defender XDR (00000007).
If org has no MDM in place: defer this policy until Intune compliance baseline is established.
Alternative for non-Intune orgs: use 'requireApprovedClientApp' or named-location restriction instead of compliantDevice.
